scenarios.description: children() rebuilds and returns a new Elements when cached list modCount mismatches after mutation
scenarios.precondition: element has one child, children() called once to build cache, then element.empty() called
scenarios.expectedResult: second call to children() returns an empty Elements instance different from the first cached instance
pseudocode: TEST TC06 children cache invalidation on modification
assert second != first;            // new instance built, not cached
